name: Grimoire Oracle
description: Sovereign AI agent providing blockchain security intelligence through the Watcher Tech Blockchain Grimoire framework. Scans smart contracts for 7 exploit archetypes, provides defense recommendations from the Atlantean Vault paradigms, and delivers threat intelligence through the 13 Family archetype lens.

services.name: MCP
services.description: Model Context Protocol server — connect from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client

services.name: HTTP-API
services.description: REST API with x402 micropayment support

setup: 1. Replace the service endpoints with your actual deployed URLs
2. Register this file on the ERC-8004 Identity Registry using the @agentic-trust/8004-sdk
3. Your agent will receive an agentId (ERC-721 NFT) representing its on-chain identity
4. As users interact with your agent, they can leave reputation feedback on the Reputation Registry
